title: Early wildfire alerting
text: The system shall detect thermal anomalies across a 25 square kilometer forest sector and alert operators within 60 seconds.

title: Mission endurance
text: The system shall sustain at least 45 minutes of on-station operation per sortie.

title: Safe degraded operation
text: The system shall maintain safe fallback behavior when GNSS or LTE connectivity degrades.

title: Traceable mission history
text: The system shall preserve mission data, operator actions, and alerts for post-mission review.
